narrative:
Clay Township has 1,021 registered voters, with 57.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.1 percentage points.
